What We Treat

Our Specialties

We specialize in the pests that require professional tenting and structural treatment — the ones that do real damage if left untreated.

⭐ Core Specialty
🪲

Drywood Termites

Tenting (fumigation) is the gold standard for drywood termites. We cover full structures — homes, condos, and commercial buildings — with complete clearance guaranteed.

⭐ Core Specialty
🐜

Carpenter Ants

These wood-destroying ants often require structural treatment. We locate the colony, treat it at the source, and seal every entry point to prevent return.

⭐ Core Specialty
🐀

Rats & Rodents

Full exclusion, trapping, and entry-point sealing. We eliminate the infestation and ensure they can't come back.

🐛

Wood-Boring Beetles

Old house borers and powderpost beetles require tenting for full eradication. We handle complete fumigation treatments.

🪳

Cockroaches

Heavy infestations may require structural treatment. We use targeted gel bait and residual products to break the breeding cycle.

🏢

Commercial Fumigation

Large-scale tenting for warehouses, retail centers, restaurants, and multi-unit properties. No job too big.

Family owned and operated. Proudly serving Miami-Dade, Broward, and the Florida Keys for over 50 years.

Why Delta

A Family Business Built on Results

We're not a franchise — we're your neighbors, and we stand behind every job we do.

1

Over 50 Years of Experience

Founded in 1970, Delta has handled thousands of jobs from single-family homes to massive commercial properties.

2

Licensed, Insured & Certified

Every technician is state-licensed. We carry full liability insurance on every residential and commercial job.

3

Termite Tenting Specialists

Fumigation is the most effective treatment for drywood termites. We've been doing it longer than most companies in South Florida.

4

Fair, Transparent Pricing

Free estimates. No hidden fees. 50% deposit to book, 50% on completion — that's it.

How It Works

From Call to Clear

Most jobs can be scheduled within 24–48 hours. Here's what to expect.

01

Free Estimate

We visit your property, identify the pest and scope of the infestation, and give you an honest quote.

02

Book & Deposit

Secure your date with a 50% deposit. We handle all prep coordination and paperwork for tenting jobs.

03

Treatment Day

Our licensed crew carries out the fumigation or treatment. We walk you through every step before and after.

04

Clear & Final Payment

Once the job is confirmed complete and your home is cleared, you pay the remaining 50%. Done.
